name: Cinder and Clause
specialty: Cinder and Clause are renowned for their expertise in navigating the volatile rifts, offering a unique service in transporting valuable artifacts and individuals across the fractured realms.

members.name: Cinder Valtor
members.note: Bearing the scars of countless rift journeys, Cinder's eyes glow an eerie yellow, a remnant of a past rift incident.

members.name: Clause Kerval
members.note: Despite his stout physique, Clause is known for his uncanny agility, a trait that often leaves clients questioning his species.

visual: Cinder and Clause are a spectacle in the Undercity. Cinder, always clad in a leather trench coat, wears a silver rift-navigator device around her neck that hums softly. Clause, on the other hand, carries a massive war hammer, adorned with a skull, slung casually over his shoulder. Their stoic demeanor and silent confidence make them an intimidating yet respected presence.
reputation_note: Whispers echo in the Undercity - they're the only crew that can guarantee safe passage through the rifts, but beware, they don't come cheap.
